description: Baseline stepwise prompt matching the current JM reproduction flow: P1 asks whether a feature is discernible, P2 asks for one option or uncertainty.
p1_visibility: Your task is to identify if the visual feature '{feature_display}' is discernible in the following image. Answer only: YES, NO, or INCONCLUSIVE. Answer YES if and only if the feature is clearly discernible in the image.{leaf_absence_note}
p2_intro:
Which of the following options best describes the '{feature_display}' of the plant in this image?
If the feature is not clearly visible, choose 'Cannot determine from this image'.

Options:
p2_response_instruction: Respond with ONLY the exact option text (e.g., "{example_value}") or "{uncertain_option}".
leaf_absence_note: Note: the absence of visible leaves is itself a discernible leaf-type feature - if the stem has no apparent leaves, answer YES.
